title: Programmer Art Fix
description: A patch for Programmer Art/classic textures
body:
ℹ️ While using this resource pack, make sure it's _above_ Programmer Art, or it may not work correctly. --- The [Texture Update](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Texture_Update) has been officially released in [Java Edition 1.14](https://www.minecraft.net/article/village---pillage-out-java-), while some players still prefer the old textures. Then Mojang has announced that **Programmer Art**, a resource pack with classic look of Minecraft, is built in game. However, even after so many updates and game drops released, it still has a lot of issues – and that's why I'm making this pack. This pack is trying to fix issues found in Programmer Art, and some of them can be found on [Mojira](https://bugs.mojang.com). ![Latest Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d1nRD7RG/images/21780fbb365150b459a7ff3155dd7b5364f61854.png)
Features of this pack ## Textures ### Blocks ![Blocks featured](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d1nRD7RG/images/1a2a5d8f1c8dd1e90c684b5483e4562ae413674a.png) - Water - Dried Kelp Block - Blast Furnace - Smoker - Campfire logs - Cartography Table - Grindstone - Barrel - Composter - Stonecutter - Lectern - Loom - Wither Rose - Beehive - Smooth Quartz - Nether Wart Blocks (both, 1.16+) - Red Nether Bricks - Chiseled & Cracked Nether Bricks - All the Overworld wooden Trapdoors, except oak trapdoor - Crimson Nylium, Planks, Log tops, Sign and Door - Warped Nylium, Planks, Log tops, Sign and Door - Nether Gold & Quartz Ore (1.16+) - Crying Obsidian - Soul Soil - Soul Torch - Quartz Bricks - Respawn Anchor - Blackstone, Gilded Blackstone - Polished Blackstone, Chiseled Polished Blackstone - Polished Blackstone Bricks, Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks - Copper Blocks - Cut Coppers - Copper Ore - Tinted Glass (with [connected textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) support) - Powder Snow - Glow Item Frame - Azalea - Azalea Leaves - Cave Vines - Moss Block/Carpet - Deepslate & Cobbled Deepslate - Deepslate Bricks (normal and cracked) - Deepslate Tiles (normal and cracked) - Chiseled Deepslate - Reinforced Deepslate - Coal, Iron, Gold and Redstone Ore (1.17+) - All the Deepslate Ores - Calcite & Tuff - Dripstone Block - Mangrove Log, Roots, Leaves, Planks, Sign, Door, and Trapdoor - Mud - Mud Bricks - Mangrove Roots - Cocoa stage 2 model & texture fix (1.19+) - Chiseled Bookshelf - Cherry Log, Leaves, Planks, Sign, Hanging Sign, Door, and Trapdoor - Suspicious Sand & Gravel - Bamboo Block, Stripped Bamboo Block - Bamboo Planks, Bamboo Mosaic - Crafter - Trial Spawners, normal & ominous - Vault & Ominous Vault - All Chiseled Coppers - All Copper Grates - All Copper Bulbs - All Copper Doors - Polished Tuff - Chiseled Tuff - Tuff Bricks - Chiseled Tuff Bricks - Pale Oak Log, Stripped Log, Leaves, Planks, Sign, Door, and Trapdoor - Creaking Heart - Pale Moss Block/Carpet - Bush - Firefly Bush - Short/Tall Dry Grass - Leaf Litter - Wildflowers - Cactus Flower - Dried Ghast - Copper Torch - Copper Chests - Copper Golem Statues - Golden Dandelion - Sulfur, Potent Sulfur, Polished Sulfur, Chiseled Sulfur & Sulfur Bricks - Cinnabar, Polished Cinnabar, Chiseled Cinnabar & Cinnabar Bricks ### Items ![Items featured](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d1nRD7RG/images/7a573994e6c38d47ed735dd0a9a0b492f953a07e.png) - All the fish & fish buckets - Kelp - Dried Kelp - Phantom Membrane - Nautilus Shell - Heart of the Sea - Turtle Shell - Turtle Scute - Campfires - Crossbow - Leather Horse Armor (from Bedrock Edition) - All the Banner Patterns - All the Signs - Bell - Suspicious Stew - Honey Bottle - Honeycomb - New Dyes: black, brown, blue, and white - All the Netherite armors - Netherite Ingot - All the Netherite tools & Sword - Warped Fungus on a Stick - Music Disc _5_, _Relic_, _Precipice_, _Creator_, & _Creator_ (Music Box) - Copper Ingot - Spyglass - Raw Metals - Amethyst Shard - Candle - Powder Snow Bucket - Bucket of Axolotl‌ - Glow Ink Sac - Glow Item Frame - Goat Horn - Tadpole Bucket - Bamboo Raft - All Boats/Rafts with Chest - Mangrove, Bamboo, Cherry, and Pale Oak Boats/Doors/Signs/Hanging Signs - Disc Fragment (_5_) - Recovery Compass - Hanging Signs - Some of the item shapes and palettes of armor trims - Trial Keys, normal & ominous - All Copper Doors - Resin Clump & Resin Brick - Spawn Eggs for all the new mobs (25.1+) - Blue/Brown Eggs - All copper armors - All copper tools/weapons - Copper Nugget - Copper/Netherite Horse Armor - Classic Spawn Eggs for new mobs - All Spears - Sulfur Cube Bucket ### Mobs ![Mobs featured](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d1nRD7RG/images/fee1b9c32cd8d01af5c8d7054d3b3df77e1ed547.png) - Drowned - Villager - Zombie Villager - Pillager - Wandering Trader - Brown Mooshroom - Piglin - Zombified Piglin - Piglin Brute - Hoglin - Zoglin - Iron Golem (Deleted useless parts in its texture file to fix [MC-112679](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-112679)) - Glow Squid - Vex (1.19.3+) - Bat (1.20.3+) - All Wolf variants: woods, ashen, black, chestnut, snowy, rusty, striped, and spotted - Bogged - Creaking - Happy Ghast - Ghastling - Copper Golem - Skeleton Horse - Zombie Horse - Parched - Rabbit (26.1+) - Baby mobs - Piglet - Calf - Mooshroom Calf - Chick - Lamb - Wolf Pup - Kitten - Baby Ocelot - Foal - Baby Donkey/Mule - Undead Foal - Bunny - Baby Llama - Baby Fox - Baby Zombie - Baby Husk - Gurgle - Baby Zombie Villager - Baby Zombified Piglin - Baby Villager - Baby Strider - Baby Hoglin/Zoglin - Sulfur Cube ### Equipments - All Copper Armors - All Horse Armors - Saddles for Strider/Nautilus - Collar for Wolf (1.20.5+) - Harness for Happy Ghast - Armors for humanoid baby mobs ### Other entities - All Boats with Chest - Mangrove/Cherry/Pale Oak Boat - Bamboo Raft - Default Steve & Alex skins (wide & slim models, 1.19.3+) ### Paintings - _Baroque_ (cake, pot and sunflower) - _Cotán_ (golden apple & melon slice) ## GUI - Empty slots in inventory - Steve with beard on Spectator Teleport actions - Icons for Social Screen - Feedback icon in the new pause menu (26.2+) - Other widgets ### Mob Effect Icons - Conduit Power - Dolphin's Grace - Slow Falling - Hero of the Village - Instant Health - Instant Damage - Saturation - Darkness - Bad Omen - Raid Omen - Trial Omen - Weaving - Oozing - Infested - Wind Charged - Breath of the Nautilus ## Other - Particle of Crying Obsidian (purple → blue to match its texture) - Map icons for villages, swamp hut and jungle pyramid
This pack is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/programmer-art-fix).
